examples: the owner's mark was on all the sheep

meanings.definition: evaluation of performance by assigning a grade or score
examples: what he disliked about teaching was all the grading he had to do

meanings.definition: the act of making a visible mark on a surface
attach a tag or label to
designate as if by a mark
be a distinctive feature, attribute, or trait; sometimes in a very positive sense
examples: His modesty distinguishes him from his peers

meanings.definition: mark by some ceremony or observation
examples: The citizens mark the anniversary of the revolution with a march and a parade

meanings.definition: make or leave a mark on
to accuse or condemn or openly or formally or brand as disgraceful
examples: She was stigmatized by society because she had a child out of wedlock
She noted that someone was following her
The skin disease scarred his face permanently

meanings.definition: make small marks into the surface of
examples: score the clay before firing it

meanings.definition: establish as the highest level or best performance

examples: Cross the name of the dead person off the list

meanings.definition: put a check mark on or near or next to
examples: Please check each name on the list

meanings.definition: assign a grade or rank to, according to one's evaluation
